ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 30, 2024 @1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF GLOBAL SUPPLY COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WATER 2 TABLE, INC. A CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
